snippet.title: Ve Junoon | Awarapan 2 | Emraan Hashmi, Disha Patani | Vishesh Bhatt | Mithoon, Sayeed Q., Subodhh
snippet.description:
Phir ishq karne chala kyun?
 
Beginning the musical journey of ‘Awarapan 2’, ‘Ve Junoon’ is composed by Mithoon, sung by Subodhh Sharma and penned by Sayeed Quadri. Featuring Emraan Hashmi and Disha Patani in the video, this song is yearning in its purest form.
 
#VeJunoon #Awarapan2 #EmraanHashmi #DishaPatani #Mithoon #SayeedQuadri #SubodhhSharma
 
Song Composed and Arranged by Mithoon
Lyrics: Sayeed Quadri
Singer: Subodhh Sharma
Song Creative Head: Anugrah
Music Production: Godswill Mergulhão
Music Assistants: Anugrah, Godswill Mergulhão, Eli Rodrigues & Kaushal Gohil
Guitars: Kalyan Baruah
Violin: Jitu Thakur
Backing Vocals: Abhishek Nailwal, Mihir Sharma & Kaustubh More
Recorded at Livingwater Music by A Manivannan
Song Mixed & Mastered by Eric Pillai at Future Sound of Bombay
Assistant Mixing Engineer: Michael Edwin Pillai
Music Head Vishesh Films: Rohit Saini
 
Starring Emraan Hashmi, Disha Patani, Shabana Azmi, Suvinder Vicky, Vijayant Kohli, Aniruddh Rawal, Atul Kumar
 
Vishesh Films & Mukesh Bhatt Present
A Vishesh Bhatt Production
 
AWARAPAN 2
Produced By Vishesh Bhatt
Directed By Nitin Kakkar
Director of Photography Vishnu Rao
Editor Devendra Murdeshwar
Production Designer Teena Paradkar
Choreographer Mudassar Khan
 
Theatrical Distribution Pen Marudhar
In Cinemas 14th August 2026
 
Lyrics:

Intro
 
Chaha tha tune jisse Paaya kabhi na usse
 
Tujhko toh sab hai pataa, aye dil Saari khabar hai tujhe
 
Banjar hui hai aankhen Veeran hai ye saansen
Ab meri rooh ko na jalaa...naa jalaa
 
Aage hai teri marzi Karle tu ye khudgarzi
Hona hai hojaa tabaah...haan tabaah
 
Chorus
 
Ve Junoon, Ve Junoon, Ve Junoon, Ve Junoon, Ve Junoon Dil lutne chalaa kyun
 
Ve Junoon, Ve Junoon, Ve Junoon, Ve Junoon, Ve Junoon Dil mitne chalaa kyun..haaye
 
Phir Ishq karne chalaa kyun OOOOOOOOO..
Dil lutne chalaa kyun OOOOOOOOO..
Dil mitne chalaa kyun..haaye Phir Ishq karne chala kyun…
 
( Music )
 
OOOOOOOOOO.. OOOOOOOOOO..
 
Verse 1
 
Dekha hai pehle kahin Aisa laga kyun usse
 
Shaayad mere dard se kahin Waqif laga woh mujhe
 
Marham laga zakhmon pe Raahat mili kuchh phirse
Dil ko sukoon milaa..haan milaaaa
 
Aage hai teri marzi Karle tu ye khudgarzi
Hona hai hojaa tabaah...haan tabaah
 
Chorus
 
Ve Junoon, Ve Junoon, Ve Junoon, Ve Junoon, Ve Junoon Dil lutne chalaa kyun
 
Ve Junoon, Ve Junoon, Ve Junoon, Ve Junoon, Ve Junoon Dil mitne chalaa kyun, haaye
 
Phir Ishq karne chalaa kyun…
 
(Music)
 
Tararareiyeee yeeeeee…
 
Verse 2
 
Aisi koi daastaan
Hai dil main uske kahin Zikr woh jiska kabhi magar Khud se bhi karta nahin
 
Rakhta chhupa ke sabse Bhulaa hai jaise rakh ke
Kal woh kahin apna…..apnaaa Aage hai teri marzi
 
Karle tu ye khudgarzi
Hona hai hojaa tabaah...haan tabaah
 
Chorus
 
Ve Junoon, Ve Junoon, Ve Junoon, Ve Junoon, Ve Junoon Dil lutne chalaa kyun
 
Ve Junoon, Ve Junoon, Ve Junoon, Ve Junoon, Ve Junoon Dil mitne chalaa kyun….haaye
 
Phir ishq karne chalaa kyun
 
Ve Junooooooooooooooo Oooooooooo Oooooooooo Ooooooooooo
Ve Junooooooooooooooo Oooooooooo Oooooooooo Ooooooooooo
 
Dil ishq karne chalaa kyun Hmmmmmm…..
Phir ishq karne chalaa kyun

Welcome to the newest chapter of the YRF Spy Universe that presents an edgy origin story of a girl raised and built to kill. Alpha is a female-led action film that will take you on a fun, edge of the seat, thrilling ride that is designed as an out and out entertainer.

Yash Raj Films presents Alpha, starring Alia Bhatt, Sharvari, Anil Kapoor, and Bobby Deol. Produced by Aditya Chopra and directed by Shiv Rawail, acclaimed for the globally celebrated series The Railway Men, Alpha is in theatres worldwide now.

snippet.title: Dil Majboor Ho Gya – Aarzoo Khaan | Emotional Hindi Sad Song | New Song 2026 | Arijit Singh Vibe
snippet.description:
Dil Majboor Ho Gya – Aarzoo Khaan | Emotional Hindi Sad Song | New Song 2026 | Arijit Singh Vibe


---



Dil majboor ho gya...
teri mohabbat ke saamne.

Bahut chaha tha
khud ko sambhalna...
magar tera naam aate hi
ye dil phir se toot jaata hai.

Hum jaante the
ye ishq dard dega...
phir bhi dil ne
sirf tumhe hi chuna.

“Dil Majboor Ho Gya”
ek aise dil ki kahani hai
jo mohabbat me
apni har had se guzar gaya...
aur phir bhi wafa karta raha.

Kuch rishte
kismat me nahi hote...
magar dil unhe
bhool bhi nahi paata.

Is gaane mein
mohabbat bhi hai,
judai bhi hai,
aur ek gehra ehsaas bhi
jo dheere se kehta hai —

dil majboor ho gya...
teri chahat me kho gaya...

Agar aapne bhi
kabhi kisi ko
apni rooh se zyada chaha ho
aur uski yaadon se kabhi azaad na ho paaye ho,
to ye gaana
aapke dil ko chhoo jaayega.

🎙️ Voice: Aarzoo Khaan
